listitem.para: a n x 1 matrix of floating point integers
a n x 1 matrix of floating point integers
a n x 1 matrix of floating point integers

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Return the bitwise XOR of x1 and x2. This is the value that has 1 bits at positions where x1 and x2, but not both, have 1 bits. Does not work when one of the numbers is negative.
Note that this routine will work only up to 32 bits, or to the precision of your machine's double-precision float representation, whichever is smaller.
This routine is vectorized, i.e. it does take a column matrix n as input argument.

refsection.title: Examples
